name: Readytech Holdings Limited
analysis: RDY's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 44% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.5700, stop A$1.4157, target A$1.7650 (1.26:1) — then trail it.
